steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Both signals that two items are being discussed, so we need a plural word to refer to them.

These is a plural demonstrative pronoun that correctly refers back to the two cities mentioned, matching the sense of both.
That, this, and each are singular or incorrectly paired with the plural noun cities.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
